Account

Performance

How output is affecting outcome — insights, correlation, and trajectory. Not just BI.

You’re missing value — here’s where to focus

Similar properties see significantly better outcomes when Payments AI and Maintenance AI are enabled. Activate these agents to capture that value.

  • •Suggested focus: Enable Payments AI and Maintenance AI — similar properties see Payments AI (20% faster rent collection and 3.1% lower delinquency rates); Maintenance AI (15% faster work order resolution and 92% resident satisfaction).
  • •Top recommendation: Work order resolution is slower than similar properties. Enable Maintenance AI to automate triage, vendor dispatch, and resident follow-up.

Insights & next steps

Renewals

Renewal agents are handling 21% of conversations → renewal rate +4 pts vs last period. Handoff to staff for complex cases.

Leasing

Leasing agents averaging 92% resolution rate. On track — strong resolution driving down cost per lease.

Maintenance

No active maintenance agents. Enable Maintenance AI to automate triage and reduce work order backlog.

2 autonomous agents (Payments AI, Maintenance AI) are not active. Enabling them could expand coverage and reduce staff workload.

View Agent Roster →

Escalation rate is 9% — above the 5% target. Review SOPs and agent training to bring it down.

View Escalations →

11 escalations are still open. Clear the backlog to keep response times low and improve resolution rate.

View Escalations →
